defaultTerms: 50% Advance payment required to initiate design and procurement.
40% Payment due upon delivery of raw materials at site.
10% Final payment due immediately upon project completion prior to handover.
This estimate is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
Any modifications or extra work requested will be charged additionally.
All disputes are subject to Ahmedabad jurisdiction only.
